narratives.text: National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are mixed. The undertone is mostly steady. Demand into retail channels is moderate to instances fairly good. Loose egg demand is light to moderate in most areas. Offerings are moderate. Supplies range tightly balanced to fully adequate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are not well tested. The undertone is steady with some noting caution. Retail demand is generally light to moderate, occasionally fairly good where feature activity is planned. Food service movement is light. Distributive buying interest is as needed only. Offerings and supplies are moderate. Market activity is slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are mostly steady to lower. The undertone is steady. Retail demand remains moderate to fairly good. Loose egg movement is reported as light to moderate in most areas. Offerings are moderate. Supplies are in a range of tightly balanced to fully adequate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are lightly tested. The undertone is steady. Demand into retail channels ranges light to occasionally fairly good, generally light to moderate. Food service demand is light. Distributive buying interest is as needed only. Offerings are moderate. Current supplies are moderate. Market activity is slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are mixed. The undertone is mostly steady. Demand into retail channels is moderate to fairly good. Loose egg movement ranges light to at times fairly good, best into the food service sector supplying destination areas. Offerings are moderate. Supplies are mixed and in a range of tightly balanced to fully adequate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are not well tested. The undertone is mostly steady. Retail demand is light to at times moderate. Food service demand is light. Offerings are moderate. Current supplies are moderate. Market activity is slow to moderate.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are higher for the larger sized white caged eggs. The balance of classes are steady to lower although lightly tested. The undertone is firm for the heavier weight eggs. Retail demand is moderate to fairly good. Loose egg demand is in a range of light to at times fairly good with best movement into food service channels servicing destination areas. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to tightly balanced. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are only tested on cage free Large brown eggs. The undertone is firm for the larger sizes. Demand into both the retail and food service sectors is light to instances moderate. Offerings are moderate to at times light. Supplies are generally moderate. Market activity is moderate to slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are steady to higher. The undertone is firm. Retail demand ranges moderate to fairly good. Loose egg demand into food service and distributive channels is light to occasionally moderate. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are mostly moderate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are only lightly tested for Medium. The undertone is firm. Retail demand ranges light to moderate. Food service demand is light. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to light. Market activity is moderate to slow. The 6-Area Total shell egg inventory increased 1.3% when compared to a week ago. Additional Weekly Shell Egg Inventory Report information can be found at this link https://www.ams.usda.gov/mnreports/ams_1427.pdf
